content: /od re

Session resume: user chose restart, then asked to analyze why agent prematurely completes tasks without fulfilling requirements. Root cause analysis delivered covering: no-tool-call=done heuristic, weak sub-agent success criteria, weak verification, conclusion synthesis masking gaps, dispatcher always marking handled=true.
目前 README 中写的过于详细，比如 skill&mcp  tool and permissions 相关内容是完全没有必要的，只是保留 agent 的简洁 和 quick start 相关即可，一些参数和配置详细说明 提供说明文档即可

Simplified README.md (~780 lines → ~120 lines): kept intro, features, quick start, basic usage, minimal config example, doc links. Moved detailed content to docs/configuration-guide.md (runtime env, full config reference, LLM providers, tools/permissions, skills/MCP, debugging, make targets).
更稳的进阶版 按照这个实现
优先改进建议（按 ROI） 按照这个继续优化

ROI improvements: UseLLMAcceptance default true, stronger heuristic judge (writes+reads+mechOK), verify_workspace Go/Node/Python, sub-agent scale 15/180, signalTaskComplete criteria guard, strict acceptance tests. go test ./... pass.
cursor 是怎么知道的 只需要读一个文档具体某些行，而不是全文读
Explained Cursor two-step flow: SemanticSearch/Grep returns file:line, then Read with offset/limit for partial reads to save tokens.
需要（让 omnidev-agent 也先搜再读）

Added codeExplorationGuidance to system prompt (prompts.go), updated read_file/search_code tool descriptions and parameter hints, added prompts_test.go. go test ./internal/agent ./internal/tools pass.
继续

Implemented 8.5+/10 ROI roadmap: sub-task contract MinReadOps=2; custom verify commands (verify_commands.go); LLM judge fail no heuristic pass; strict agentLoop E2E; criteria-only conclusion; checkpoint resume with ExitGateNudges/AcceptanceIncomplete/Resumable. go test ./... pass.
继续优化 P0/P1 四项 + 模型连接失败是否会一直重连

Cross-check after LLM judge; exploration counts search/list_dir; TUI resumable hint; sub-agent verify-fix unified; bounded stream retry in chat.go. LLM retries bounded (default 4 attempts), not infinite. go test ./... pass.
继续，若是网络错误默认就持续重连

Network errors now retry indefinitely (PersistNetworkRetry default true) until success or ctx cancel; non-network still bounded by llm_max_retries. TUI shows reconnect countdown. Config llm_persist_network_retry / OMNIDEV_LLM_PERSIST_NETWORK_RETRY. go test ./... pass.
要支持可以翻用户提出历史问题

TUI input history: plain ↑↓ browses prior user prompts (not slash commands); Ctrl/Alt+↑↓ and PgUp/PgDn scroll transcript; history restored from session turns on load; /clear resets history. Files: input.go, update.go, persist.go, tui.go, header.go, permission.go, tests. go test ./internal/tui/... pass.
发现一个很严重的问题，为什么会出现持续读文件，而且相同的文件读了很多次

Root cause: context slimming archived read_file as 'use read_file again' + acceptance recovery loops + review tasks hitting write/build criteria. Fixes: session read_file cache/dedup, slim read results keep preview not re-read hint, explored-files system addendum, review-specific acceptance criteria, read-only cross-check skips writes, default keep 8 tool results. go test ./... pass.
处于thinking 状态好久了，不知道具体在干什么；是在持续修复问题，还是什么？没有过程信息展示； 还是默认展开thinking

Added ActivityMsg for live process (Calling model turn N/M, Running tools, Checking acceptance, recovery round). Working indicator shows detail; major events as status lines in transcript. Process StreamChunkMsg routed to status not collapsed Thinking. Auto-expand Thinking while streaming; collapsed preview 2 lines. go build ./... pass.
过程状态不应该是thinking应该是working；executing改working；验收期间打印标准逐项勾选

StateExecuting/StateVerifying display as Working; only LLM wait shows Thinking. Acceptance checklist: init all criteria as pending, update each with checkmark as verified. TUI renders Acceptance criteria block. go test ./internal/tui/... pass.
是不是进入死循环了，没有验收通过，打印因为什么没有验收通过，我运行了生成贪吃蛇，是能够正常运行，那么一直在验收的是什么，验收的标准是不是定义与实际不符合；要求agent在整个执行过程中整个过程详细信息，除了部分要打印到控制台；同时要全部输入日志到日志文件中，文件放到当前目录（运行二进制文件的目录）

Root cause: not infinite loop but acceptance recovery — auto verify task requires go test ./... pass; snake runs manually but 3 unit tests fail. Fixed build/test split (BuildOK vs TestOK), heuristic test criterion no longer false-pass, formatAcceptanceReport prints per-criterion FAIL+reason on each cycle, stall detection stops after 3 identical failures (max 15 cycles). Added runlog package writing omnidev-agent-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.log next to binary; wired SetRunLog in main, agent logRun for tools/LLM/acceptance; footer shows log path. Fixed compile (duplicate SetAcceptanceStrict, missing context import). go test ./... pass.
最终生成的项目文件夹名称没有按照功能需求名称来定义，之前是可以的

Root cause: DeriveProjectDir fell back to project-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS when Chinese prompts lacked keyword hits (e.g. 写一个终端小游戏) and only ASCII words were extracted; follow-up turns could overwrite outputDir with new timestamp folder. Fixes: chinesePhraseSlugs/chineseTokenSlugs, DeriveProjectDirFromTexts tries all session user messages, shouldReuseProjectWorkspace for follow-ups, setupProjectWorkspace helper, 生成/写一个 in newProjectVerbs. go test ./... pass.
单元测试验收不过，是程序问题还是路径这些都要去分析，不能一直怀疑程序问题

Added verify failure diagnosis (path/workspace, environment, test harness, program). mechanicalVerifyResult carries VerifyDir+Diagnosis; formatAcceptanceReport shows Failure diagnosis block with evidence and ordered actions; recovery/verify-fix prompts require classify-before-fix; stall hint warns against rewriting app code for path/env/test issues. go test ./... pass.
为什么会出现不断地读这个文件

Root cause: acceptance recovery loop (turn 13/20 verify task) drives edit→read→edit pattern; read cache keyed by path+offset+limit so varying params bypass dedup; cache was not invalidated after edit_file. Fixes: InvalidatePath on write/edit/delete; path-level throttle after 2 disk reads without edit; explain in response. go test ./... pass.
Calling model (turn 8/20)是什么意思，为什么一直是这个状态，应该是 Working 状态

Calling model = waiting for LLM API on turn N/M (not stuck). Tool loop now StateExecuting + Working · calling model; chat-only stays Thinking. normalizeActivityLabel prefixes legacy Calling model with Working. go test ./... pass.
验收报告默认折叠，外面显示验收通过查看详细；上下两部分重复；验收过程应逐项勾选并支持跳过

Fixed duplicate: formatAcceptanceReport no longer concatenated with formatConclusionFromCriteria. AllCompleteMsg carries AcceptanceDetail; completion panel collapsed 验收通过 N/N · 查看详细 with click expand. Live checklist pinned during verify, progressive checkoff 200ms, StatusSkipped for N/A tests. go test ./... pass.
全部优化，目前日志文件中打印的日志是否详细，若不详细，则继续添加；以方便跟踪整个过程，优化耗时耗token的环节

Implemented full optimization checklist P0-P2: test evidence passes functional criteria when go test green (skips LLM judge); verify task build-only unless user requests tests; pre-recovery skip when mechanical+tests satisfy; block large whole-file write_file on existing _test.go; edit_file failure hints; default UseLLMAcceptance off; enhanced runlog (turn timing, acceptance_decision source, read_cache CACHED/THROTTLED/INVALIDATE, tool args metadata via SummarizeToolArgsForLog, verify diagnosis). go test ./... pass.
